summary: Frontend-only retest of redesigned Yuval Cohen portfolio at https://yuval-journey.preview.emergentagent.com. The trail-band redesign (full-bleed parallax sections with hand-picked MTB ride frames as backgrounds, hexagon capability badges, wooden signposts, parallax project markers, campfire connect band) renders cleanly with ZERO uncaught runtime errors, ZERO page errors, and ZERO console errors. The Framer Motion 'Offsets must be monotonically non-decreasing' error is NOT present. All 5 TrailBand sections (about / experience / tools / works / connect) render with their correct CSS background-image referencing /ride/ride_00XX.webp (frames 0020, 0100, 0160, 0200, 0241 confirmed loading via DOM inspection). All required data-testid hooks are present and functional: 5 about hexagons, 4 experience signposts, 9 work markers, lets-ride-button (scrolls 0→3456), download-cv-button (/Yuval-Cohen-CV.pdf), lets-talk-button + connect-lets-talk both open contact-modal, contact-submit + contact-close + form inputs all present and working. Journey panel + 4 nav items present on desktop, hidden on mobile. Mobile (390x844) has NO horizontal overflow at any scroll position (verified at 6 scroll depths through 11508px document height). Works hover reveals project description. Total page works: Loader hides quickly, all 241 webp frames pre-load fine.
critical_code_review_comments: TrailBand.jsx uses useScroll with offset ['start end','end start'] and a single useTransform [0,1]→['-7%','7%'] — offsets are monotonic, no WAAPI error.
ContactModal uses AnimatePresence with exit animations; Playwright tests waiting <600ms after close may still see the element in DOM during fade-out. Not a real bug, just a timing characteristic.
Lenis smooth scroll properly disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set (Portfolio.jsx line 16-19), allowing programmatic scrolling to work for testing.

All CSS background images use inline style backgroundImage url(/ride/ride_XXXX.webp) — verified via DOM inspection: about=0020, experience=0100, tools=0160, works=0200, connect=0241. All 241 frames exist in /public/ride.
No backend code present — confirmed frontend-only build. No /api references.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned portfolio works flawlessly. Use page.emulate_media(reduced_motion='reduce') to disable Lenis and enable programmatic window.scrollTo / scroll_into_view_if_needed for reaching deep sections reliably. Background images per section: about=ride_0020.webp, experience=ride_0100.webp, tools=ride_0160.webp, works=ride_0200.webp, connect=ride_0241.webp. When testing contact-close, wait >=800ms for AnimatePresence exit animation before checking is_visible(). No backend exists.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Iteration 2 redesign passes all 11 criteria from the review request.
